caption: Against a plain, bright white background, a logo consisting of the letters "MP" emerges and transforms. Initially, the "MP" logo appears as a faint, thin white outline with a small graphic element integrated into the center. As the sequence progresses, the logo rapidly scales down and shifts toward the right, momentarily appearing as a small, dark silhouette. It then expands and centers itself, transitioning into a bold, dark blue font. The final state reveals the complete logo, featuring the bold "MP" text in dark blue with a detailed, circular graphic emblem nested between the two letters. The sequence captures a smooth animation of the logo scaling, moving, and changing color from a transparent outline to a solid, finished brand mark.
